programme.title: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: The challenges of impending parenthood turn the lives of five couples upside down.

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother
programme.desc: An easygoing dimwit (Paul Rudd) disrupts the lives of his three ambitious sisters.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Doctor Parnassus
programme.desc: An immortal carnival master must collect five souls or else lose his daughter to the devil.

programme.title: Nerve
programme.desc: A teen joins a popular online game that dares players to perform increasingly dangerous stunts.

programme.title: Veronica Mars
programme.desc: Veronica turns amateur sleuth once again when ex-boyfriend Logan is accused of murder.

programme.title: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: A time-folding federal agent (Denzel Washington) falls in love with a future murder victim.

programme.title: Panic Room
programme.desc: A woman and her daughter must play a cat-and-mouse game after three thieves invade their home.

programme.title: When a Stranger Calls
programme.desc: A sadistic phone caller terrorizes a teenage babysitter (Camilla Belle).

programme.title: The Stepfather
programme.desc: A young man (Penn Badgley) suspects that his mother's new lover (Dylan Walsh) is up to no good.

programme.title: The Possession
programme.desc: Parents (Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Kyra Sedgwick) must save their daughter from an evil spirit.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger investigates murders in an Old West town that's run by a former Confederate officer.

programme.title: Guns of Redemption
programme.desc: A gunslinger with a violent past tries to save a woman from vicious men who run a traveling brothel.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Doctor Parnassus
programme.desc: An immortal carnival master must collect five souls or else lose his daughter to the devil.

programme.title: The Imaginarium of Doctor Parnassus
programme.desc: An immortal carnival master must collect five souls or else lose his daughter to the devil.

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother
programme.desc: An easygoing dimwit (Paul Rudd) disrupts the lives of his three ambitious sisters.

programme.title: The Loft
programme.desc: A dead woman is found in a loft which five men share for extramarital trysts.

programme.title: When a Stranger Calls
programme.desc: A sadistic phone caller terrorizes a teenage babysitter (Camilla Belle).

programme.title: 88 Minutes
programme.desc: A forensic psychiatrist (Al Pacino) has less than 90 minutes to find the source of a death threat.

programme.title: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: A time-folding federal agent (Denzel Washington) falls in love with a future murder victim.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger investigates murders in an Old West town that's run by a former Confederate officer.

programme.title: Pompeii
programme.desc: A gladiator tries to save the woman he loves while Mount Vesuvius rains down lava and ash.

programme.title: The Possession
programme.desc: Parents (Jeffrey Dean Morgan, Kyra Sedgwick) must save their daughter from an evil spirit.

programme.title: Security
programme.desc: A security guard protects an eleven-year-old girl who is being targeted by a gang.

programme.title: The Kill Room
programme.desc: An art dealer teams up with a hit man and his boss for a money-laundering scheme.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Black
programme.desc: A wealthy entrepreneur introduces a young woman to S&M in a spoof of "Fifty Shades of Grey."

programme.title: A Haunted House 2
programme.desc: Paranormal mischief continues to plague Malcolm (Marlon Wayans) and his new family.

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: A man (Marlon Wayans) seeks help to exorcise a demon from his girlfriend (Essence Atkins).

programme.title: A Haunted House
programme.desc: A man (Marlon Wayans) seeks help to exorcise a demon from his girlfriend (Essence Atkins).

programme.title: Ten Thousand Saints
programme.desc: A teen, a pregnant girl and a punk-rock singer form a surrogate family in late-1980s New York.
